query:
SELECT chrStatus, COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN dteTermination IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_dteTermination,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dteTermination IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_dteTermination,
  MIN(updatedAt) as min_updatedAt,
  MAX(updatedAt) as max_updatedAt
FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE chrStatus IN ('REMOVED', 'RENTED', 'IN_TERMINATION')
GROUP BY chrStatus;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3eAQdaRY4zkjYsC.95a35ec57269 --database FWQUTMFHrecTsndnoBiUKo --execute SELECT chrStatus, COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN dteTermination IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_dteTermination,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dteTermination IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_dteTermination,
  MIN(updatedAt) as min_updatedAt,
  MAX(updatedAt) as max_updatedAt
FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE chrStatus IN ('REMOVED', 'RENTED', 'IN_TERMINATION')
GROUP BY chrStatus;
